title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.301 - Missouri Fox Trotter Week designated for first full week in September
text:
9.301.  Missouri Fox Trotter Week designated for first full week in September. — The first full week in September is hereby designated as "Missouri Fox Trotter Week" in Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities in recognition of our state horse, the Missouri fox trotter, a breed which originated in the Ozarks and is beloved by cowboys and ranchers for its comfort and reliability.
(L. 2021 S.B. 72)
